name: Ziggy's Chase
short_description: Never mind the plumber, the hedgehog is coming to Steam! THE GAME FEATURES CLASSIC GAMEPLAY, AND VR MODE AS WELL.
detailed_description:
Never mind the plumber, the hedgehog is coming to Steam!
THE GAME FEATURES CLASSIC GAMEPLAY, AND VR MODE AS WELL.

Synopsis

Ziggy the hedgehog is living an interesting life on a golf course, but various naughty creatures want to spoil all the fun. Help Ziggy to avoid the obstacles, retrieve all of his golf equipment, and safely roll a ball down a golf hole.

The game

Ziggy's Chase is a 3D platformer with colorful graphics and multitude of obstacles and enemies. You can run, jump and shoot, and also use some other kinds of transportation like boat or a seesaw. It has the visual vibe of some older console games, but with many new tweaks and perks.

THE GAME FEATURES CLASSIC GAMEPLAY, AND VR MODE AS WELL.

Key features


  • enjoy rich cartoon graphics
  • fight or avoid odd creatures and machines that invaded your golf course
  • pick up goodies for foodies to achieve better score
  • use platforms, seesaws and boats to reach remote parts of the island
  • use hidden contraptions to open doors
  • groove to the original funky music
  • 30 levels of pure fun
